name: inflect (English Pluralization and Number Words)

agent_readiness.notes: English pluralization, ordinals, and number-to-words. import inflect. p = inflect.engine(). p.plural('dog'). p.plural('child'). p.singular_noun('dogs'). p.a('elephant'). p.number_to_words(42). p.number_to_words(1000000). p.ordinal(3). p.inflect('Found %(num)d file%(plural)s' % {'num': 3, 'plural': p.plural('', 3)}). p.join(['one', 'two', 'three']). p.plural_noun('matrix'). English only — not multilingual. Used in CLI tools, report generation, UI text.

gotchas: Some irregular plurals require manual override
API is all through engine() instance — stateless global not provided
best_when: Dynamic UI text where plural/singular changes with count
Number-to-words conversion for natural language output
Generating proper English articles (a/an) before nouns
CLI tools with grammatically correct status messages
avoid_when: When num2words provides better number formatting
summary: inflect provides English pluralization, number-to-words, and ordinals. p = inflect.engine(). p.plural('child') → 'children'. p.a('elephant') → 'an elephant'. p.number_to_words(42) → 'forty-two'. p.ordinal(3) → 'third'. p.join(['one', 'two', 'three']). MIT by Jason R. Coombs. English-only. Best for dynamic UI text with proper plurals and natural language report generation.
